items.title: Vector store index → metadata
items.scenario: A vector DB returns chunk ids; you need each chunk's title and source URL.
items.explanation: `metadata: dict[str, ChunkMeta]` lets each lookup happen in O(1) instead of scanning a list of all chunks.

items.title: Deduplicating embeddings
items.scenario: Many requests share the same input text; you don't want to pay the embedding API twice.
items.explanation: A `dict[hash_of_text, vector]` cache turns repeated calls into hash-table hits.

items.title: Visited-set during graph search
items.scenario: BFS or DFS over a knowledge graph must not revisit nodes.
items.explanation: `visited: set[NodeId]` (a hash table without values) supports O(1) `in`/`add` per step.

items.title: Per-session rate limits
items.scenario: Track token counts and request counts per user/session.
items.explanation: `usage: dict[SessionId, Counter] = {}` — hash-keyed metrics with O(1) updates.
